hero.title: File Optimizer
hero.description: Estimate file compression locally from file metadata without uploading private files.

features.title: A private workspace for file optimization estimates
features.description: File Optimizer V1 focuses on explicit user actions, local metadata, and clear savings estimates.

items.title: Add file metadata
items.description: Use the file picker or enter name, type, and size manually.

items.title: Choose a profile
items.description: Compare Standard, High, and Archive-ready simulated compression outcomes.

items.title: Save local records
items.description: Keep metadata-only optimization history in the current browser.

flow.title: Select -> Estimate -> Review
steps: Choose a file or enter metadata manually

benefits.title: Understand likely savings before changing files
benefits.description: V1 gives users a controlled estimate without file uploads, binary storage, or backend processing.

items.title: Privacy-first
items.description: File contents are not uploaded, synced, or stored.

items.title: Fast estimates
items.description: Profile-based calculations show estimated compressed size and savings immediately.

items.title: Simple history
items.description: Search, delete, and clear browser-local optimization records.

differences.title: Designed for safe local exploration
differences.description: File Optimizer avoids server-side compression in V1 and keeps the workflow transparent.

items.title: Select
items.description: Choose a file only after an explicit user action.

items.title: Estimate
items.description: Generate a simulated compressed size from profile and metadata.

items.title: Review
items.description: Use History and Insights to inspect local optimization records.

feel.title: Controlled, local, and low-risk
feel.description: The workflow keeps private files under user control while still providing useful estimates.

items.title: No background processing
items.description: The app works only when the user chooses a file or saves metadata.

items.title: Clear results
items.description: Each record shows original size, estimated size, profile, and savings percent.

items.title: Easy cleanup
items.description: Users can delete records one by one or clear all local records.

useCases.title: Useful before sharing or archiving files
useCases.description: File Optimizer is best for quick local estimates when users want to understand likely file savings.

items.title: Presentation prep
items.description: Estimate whether a presentation might benefit from compression before sending.

items.title: Archive planning
items.description: Compare local savings estimates for files intended for storage.

items.title: File review
items.description: Keep a lightweight record of which files were evaluated.

audiences.title: Who uses File Optimizer
audiences.description: Helpful for people who need quick file-size decisions without uploading files.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Estimate savings for files before sharing with colleagues or clients.

items.title: Students
items.description: Review assignment or presentation sizes before submission.

items.title: Privacy-conscious users
items.description: Avoid uploading files just to understand likely compression savings.

resourceSection.title: File Optimizer essentials
resourceSection.description: The V1 workflow is intentionally small and local-first.

items.title: Compressor
items.description: Add metadata and generate a simulated compression result.

items.title: History
items.description: Search, delete, and clear local records.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review total files, original size, estimated savings, average savings, and recent activity.

groupedSection.title: Estimate compression without backend storage
groupedSection.description: Move from explicit file selection to local-only review.

items.name: File picker
items.description: Fill name, size, and type from an explicit file selection.

items.name: Manual entry
items.description: Type metadata when a picker is not needed.

items.name: Profiles
items.description: Choose Standard, High, or Archive-ready.

items.name: History
items.description: Keep metadata-only records in localStorage.

technicalSection.title: Browser-local V1 implementation
technicalSection.description: File Optimizer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture while avoiding backend file persistence.
items: Zustand app-local state with browser localStorage persistence.
No file uploads, binary localStorage, server-side compression, or background file processing.

items.question: Does File Optimizer upload my file?
items.answer: No. V1 uses browser-local metadata only and does not upload file contents.

items.question: Does it create a real compressed file?
items.answer: No. V1 generates simulated compression estimates only.

items.question: What is stored locally?
items.answer: Only file name, type, original size, estimated compressed size, savings percent, profile, and creation time are stored in the current browser.

finalCta.title: Open File Optimizer
finalCta.description: Estimate file savings locally without uploading private files.
